data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards one week before appointments for elderly patients without email. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature or any related functionality. The linked use case mentions the requirement, but the absence of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.
